results.alert:
[prometheus] HighLatencyP99 — checkout-api
time: 2026-03-14T09:48:00
labels: severity=critical team=payments env=production

ALERT HighLatencyP99 firing for checkout-api
expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{service="checkout-api"}[5m])) > 1.0
current value: 4.12s (threshold 1.0s)
duration: 3m
Customer checkout requests are timing out. Payment conversion dropping.

time: 2026-03-14T09:46:00
labels: severity=critical team=platform env=production

Synthetic login check failed 5 consecutive times.
endpoint: https://auth.internal/healthz
last error: x509: certificate has expired or is not yet valid
successful_logins_per_min dropped 420 -> 0.
No user can authenticate. Total outage.

[pagerduty] Multiple services degraded — checkout-api, search-api, inventory-service
time: 2026-03-14T09:47:00
labels: severity=critical team=platform env=production

3 services breached error-rate SLO within 4 minutes.
  checkout-api      error_rate 31.0%
  inventory-service error_rate 47.0%
  search-api        error_rate 18.0%
No deploys in the last 6 hours.
Escalated to primary on-call.

expr: increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{service="cart-service"}[1h]) > 3

[sentry] Error rate spike — payment-service

labels: severity=critical team=payments env=production

users affected: 940
Payments are failing at the authorization step.

[pagerduty] TOTAL OUTAGE — api-gateway returning 500s
labels: severity=critical team=platform env=production

Every request to api-gateway is failing.
No deploys in the last 12 hours.
CPU utilisation DROPPED from 40% to 6% at onset.
logs: x509: certificate has expired or is not yet valid
results.trap: screams outage; the x509 line and falling CPU are the signal

results.alert:
[prometheus] HighErrorRate — orders-api
labels: severity=critical team=commerce env=production

orders-api error_rate 34%.
A deploy (dpl-9912) landed 3 minutes ago.
redis-orders p99 latency rose to 8400ms SIX minutes ago,
before the deploy. Two other services also degraded.
results.trap: a recent deploy invites bad_deploy; the dependency moved first

results.alert:
[sentry] Database connection failures — ledger-service
labels: severity=critical team=payments env=production

Error: connection pool exhausted, request timed out.
Request rate FLAT at 88 rps.
Pool active connections FELL from 35 to 8 at onset.
postgres-main is healthy: CPU 18%, 40 connections free.
results.trap: errors name the database; the ceiling dropped, load did not rise

results.alert:
[prometheus] PodRestartLoop — media-worker
labels: severity=critical team=platform env=production

9 restarts in the last hour, exit code 137.
No deploys in the last 72 hours.
memory_mb climbs to the 4096Mi limit then resets, repeatedly.
Request rate unchanged for a week.
results.trap: no recent deploy invites 'unknown'; the sawtooth is the signal

results.alert:
[sentry] CRITICAL FATAL ERROR — analytics-batch
labels: severity=critical team=growth env=production

Error: FATAL: nightly rollup job exceeded its window.
The job completed successfully on retry 20 minutes later.
No user-facing surface consumes this data in real time.
0 users affected.
results.trap: CRITICAL/FATAL/severity=critical all lie; impact is zero

results.alert:
[healthcheck] search-api rejecting internal callers
labels: severity=warning team=platform env=production

search-api began returning 403 to three internal services.
No code deploy. configmap search-api-config moved to revision 22
four minutes before onset, changing allowed_origins.
External traffic is unaffected.
results.trap: labelled warning, and a configmap is easy to miss as 'a deploy'
